# Keyboard Shortcuts Reference

## Global Shortcuts (All Modes)

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `?` | Open Help modal (keyboard shortcuts) |
| `Escape` | Close any open modal or dialog |
| `Ctrl+Shift+X` | Toggle between XSLT â†” XPath mode |

---

## XSLT Mode

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Ctrl+Enter` (Windows/Linux)  | **Run XSLT transform** |
| `Cmd+Enter` (Mac) | **Run XSLT transform** |
| `Ctrl+/` | Toggle line comment in editor |
| `Ctrl+Shift+Alt+F` | Format/prettify XSLT |
| `Ctrl+F` | Find in editor |
| `Ctrl+H` | Find & replace in editor |
| `Tab` | Indent selected lines |
| `Shift+Tab` | Unindent selected lines |

---

## XPath Mode

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Ctrl+Enter` (Windows/Linux) | **Run/evaluate XPath expression** |
| `Cmd+Enter` (Mac) | **Run/evaluate XPath expression** |
| `Enter` (in XPath input bar) | **Run/evaluate XPath expression** |
| `â†‘` (in XPath input bar) | Cycle to previous expression in history |
| `â†“` (in XPath input bar) | Cycle to next expression / back to draft |
| `Escape` (in XPath input bar) | Clear draft and return to last saved expression |

---

## Editor Navigation

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Ctrl+G` | Go to line number |
| `Ctrl+Home` | Jump to start of document |
| `Ctrl+End` | Jump to end of document |
| `PageUp` / `PageDown` | Scroll one page |
| `Alt+â†‘` / `Alt+â†“` | Move line up/down |

---

## Text Selection & Editing

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Ctrl+A` | Select all |
| `Ctrl+C` | Copy |
| `Ctrl+X` | Cut |
| `Ctrl+V` | Paste |
| `Ctrl+Z` | Undo |
| `Ctrl+Shift+Z` | Redo |
| `Delete` / `Backspace` | Delete selected text |

---

## Tips

- **Use keyboard** for fastest workflow â€” most actions have shortcuts
- **"?" button** opens an in-app help modal with this reference
- **Right-click** on any editor pane for context menu (Copy, Clear, Format)
- **XPath history** is preserved across sessions â€” reuse common expressions with `â†‘/â†“`
- **Vim/Emacs keybindings** may be available depending on Monaco Editor configuration (check Settings)

---

## Browser DevTools (Debugging)

| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `F12` (Windows/Linux) | Open browser DevTools |
| `Cmd+Option+I` (Mac) | Open browser DevTools |
| `Ctrl+Shift+I` (Windows/Linux) | Open browser DevTools |
| `Ctrl+Shift+C` | Inspect element mode |
| `Ctrl+Shift+J` | Open DevTools Console tab |
| `Ctrl+Shift+K` | Open DevTools Console (alternative) |

---

## Need Help?

- Press **`?`** in the app to see this reference
- See [User Guide](./README.md) for detailed feature explanations
- Check [Project README](../../README.md) for FAQ and troubleshooting
